title: Add rate limiting to the API gateway
body:
## Problem

The API gateway currently has no rate limiting, which allows clients to overwhelm downstream services.

## Proposed Solution

Implement token bucket rate limiting at the gateway level with configurable limits per client tier:

- Free tier: 100 req/min
- Pro tier: 1000 req/min
- Enterprise: unlimited

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Rate limiter middleware implemented
- [ ] Limits configurable via environment variables
- [ ] 429 responses include Retry-After header
- [ ] Metrics exposed for monitoring
